subcodes.first_line: O flower of the rose-garden of God's love! A sweet breeze wafteth from the garden of divine bounty, and an enchanting fragrance bloweth from the meadows [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای گل گلزار محبت الله نسیم خوشی از حدیقه عنایت میوزد و نفحه دلکشی از ریاض
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @high station of the true believer, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God as sun
